src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the @Generated annotation to reflect the new JHipster generator version.
Reformat the empty annotation interface body to use a single line for conciseness.
Explicitly exclude H2 Console auto-configuration to align with Spring Boot 3.x package structure and security defaults.
Rename logger instance from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Disable Spring Boot DevTools restart via system property to prevent conflicts with Hazelcast initialization.
Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables to leverage Java 10+ local variable type inference.
Extract application name into a dedicated variable to improve readability and avoid repeated property lookups.
Refactor Optional usage to use method chaining for cleaner code style.
Update all logger method calls to use the renamed 'LOG' variable.
Realign string concatenation in AspectJ pointcut expressions for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed indentation of '|| within(...)' lines in @Pointcut annotations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Realign method call arguments in logging statements for consistent indentation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Reformatted logger.error() calls to align arguments vertically.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace ternary null check with String.valueOf to handle potential null cause safely and concisely.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'Logger log = logger(joinPoint);' to 'var log = logger(joinPoint);'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Introduce a nested configuration class to manage Liquibase-specific properties like async start behavior.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private final Liquibase field and nested static class with asyncStart property and accessors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor logger instance to follow standard static final naming convention.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'private final Logger log' to 'private static final Logger LOG'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
Rename constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for consistency or clarity.
Remove unused imports for BuildProperties and GitProperties as they are no longer used in the class.
Remove unused imports for KeyGenerator and PrefixedKeyGenerator as the custom key generator bean is removed.
Replace wildcard import with specific imports for Bean and Configuration.
Convert instance logger field to static final constant following standard logging conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl:
-private final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CacheConfiguration.class);
+private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(CacheConfiguration.class);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update all log calls to use the new static LOG constant.
Remove unused fields for GitProperties and BuildProperties.
Remove setter methods for GitProperties and BuildProperties as the fields are removed.
Remove the custom KeyGenerator bean definition that relied on the removed properties.
Remove redundant inline comment in the else block for production configuration.
Enable configuration properties for H2 console to support conditional bean creation.
Add conditional annotation to H2 TCP server bean to only start if H2 console is enabled.
Refactor logger instance to be static final and use uppercase naming convention.
Update log calls to use the new static final logger field.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: LOG.debug("H2 database is available on port {}", port);

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable initialization.
Remove the explicit registration of Hibernate5JakartaModule from the Jackson configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of Hibernate5JakartaModule and deleted the hibernate5Module() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace instance logger field with static final logger constant following modern Java logging conventions.
Inject ApplicationProperties to allow runtime configuration of Liquibase startup behavior.
Implement conditional logic to choose between async and sync Liquibase initialization based on application properties.
Convert contexts list to comma-delimited string only if not empty to avoid passing null/empty strings.
Convert label filter list to comma-delimited string only if not empty to avoid passing null/empty strings.
